rulings.Case Title: OLEG PAFNUTIEFF VS. ANDREI BOWSUNOWSKI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 04, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT ANDREI BOWSUNOWSKI's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend per Harper 154 Cal.App.3rd 908. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEVRIES, BARBARA CONSERVATOR OF ESTATE OF KIYOKO VS. DAVID LEWIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 04, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT DAVID LEWIS' Motion To Seal. Grant remasking until January 31, 2013, CCP 1161.2. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CORNELIUS DESPANIE VS. DEBBIE ELLIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 04, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs DEBBIE ELLIS and MICHAEL WALLS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective, San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9(C). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. KEVIN DUNN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 04, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT GEOFFREY WORKMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - five days to answer. Defendant fails to to site California authority. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. KEVIN DUNN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Or Taking Off Calendar Pre-Judgment Claim Of Right To Possession And Demurrer To Complaint As Untimely Filed
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF BETTY MORRIS Motion To Strike. Deny - sought post and mail.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JASON KOBELT
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 04, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT JASON KOBELT's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Grant, subject to opposition. Moving party to file answer forthwith. = (501/REQ)
